text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Heh, it's finally time to show my stuff! I'm gettin'
goosebumps just thinking about it!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Gotta make sure everyone knows that Hishi
Amazon is here to stay!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! You'd better keep your eyes on me, Teach!
I'm gonna crush every single one of my
opponents, no matter how strong they are!
